channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs Real Madrid: Live Streams & TV Channels for El Clasico 2025/26
item.description: We'll show you how to watch Barcelona vs Real Madrid live streams from anywhere in the world with Los Blancos needing El Clasico win to keep title hopes alive.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 vs Nothing Phone (4a) : comment choisir le meilleur téléphone milieu de gamme ?
item.description: Samsung vend des palettes entières de ses Galaxy A tous les ans, mais la concurrence est plus féroce que jamais. Au même niveau de prix, le Nothing Phone (4a) a tout d'un rival de poids. Lequel faut-il préférer ?

item.title: La nouvelle génération de sonnette vidéo 2K connectée et sur batterie se retrouve en promo à -40%
item.description: La Ring Battery Video Doorbell (Gen 2) est une sonnette vidéo qui filme en 2K et fonctionne avec une batterie pour un accès permanent à ce qu'elle voit, en promo pour 59,99 euros au lieu de 99,99 euros.

item.title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
item.description: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

item.title: The hottest place for startups to strike a deal? The F1 paddock
item.description: F1 Grands Prix have emerged as a new place to see and be seen if you are a founder or investor.

item.title: 'People use smartphones more but invest less in their security': New report claims McAfee and Norton remain the most loved antivirus brands as users ditch lesser-known security products for free tools like Microsoft Defender or Apple Xprotect
item.description: Smartphone usage dominates daily life, but most users avoid paying for security, relying instead on built-in protections and limited awareness

item.title: I’m a certified TV calibrator, and I tested the LG C6 and LG G5 OLEDs side-by-side to see which is better value — and I was surprised by the result
item.description: With the LG C6's launch imminent, is it better value than last year's flagship G5? I tested the two side-by-side to find out

item.title: The FCCs proposed plan to fight spam calls puts consumer privacy in jeopardy
item.description: Burner phones might become a thing of the past if the FCC has its way.
